name: Fluorescence Colocalization Analysis
description: You are a cell biologist analyzing protein co-localization in fluorescence microscopy data. Using the 'Fluorescent Cells' sample image in Fiji, perform a quantitative colocalization analysis between the red and green channels. Measure the thresholded area for each channel, the mean fluorescence intensity within each channel's thresholded region, and the pixel-level overlap area. Compute at least one colocalization coefficient (Pearson correlation coefficient r, Manders overlap coefficients M1/M2, or intersection-over-union). Save all measurements with clear column headers to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/colocalization_results.csv. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.

metadata.image_source: Fiji built-in sample (File > Open Samples > Fluorescent Cells)
